content:
✔ Example: A high-stakes literary analysis gauntlet for an exclusive bonus.

🚀 Version 5.6 now finalizes XP scaling, item decay, one-shot gambits, streak/recovery systems, and risk-reward mechanics.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 5.7 – The Ascetic Path, Final Lock-In Adjustments, & The Cerberus Challenge


🚀 This version introduces a “Non-Participant” archetype with a high-risk/high-reward path, confirms extended failure penalties, and offers a secret final challenge or a “dog treat” shortcut past it.

📜 1. The Ascetic Path – The “Pacifist” Archetype

📜 For students who completely refuse to engage with the XP system, skill checks, or game mechanics.

✔ No weekly benefits, no items, no rerolls, no challenges, no risks.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 209 (chunk 209/555)
